mapper.select:
select pi.product_info_id , pi.product_name , pi.barcode , pi.category , pi.brand , pi.specification , pi.unit , pi.images_resource_key , pi.serial_number , pi.shelf_life , pi.min_stock , pi.product_status_enum_product_status_enum_id_1 ,images.resource_id as images_resource_id ,images.resource_name as images_resource_name ,images.resource_path as images_resource_path ,images.related_table_name as images_related_table_name ,images.related_table_key as images_related_table_key ,images.relate_table_column_name as images_relate_table_column_name FROM product_info pi left join (select resource_id, resource_name, resource_path, related_table_name, related_table_key, relate_table_column_name from static_resources where related_table_name='product_info' and relate_table_column_name='images' ) as images on images.related_table_key=pi.product_info_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}

select pi.product_info_id , pi.product_name , pi.barcode , pi.category , pi.brand , pi.specification , pi.unit , pi.images_resource_key , pi.serial_number , pi.shelf_life , pi.min_stock , pi.product_status_enum_product_status_enum_id_1 ,images.resource_id as images_resource_id ,images.resource_name as images_resource_name ,images.resource_path as images_resource_path ,images.related_table_name as images_related_table_name ,images.related_table_key as images_related_table_key ,images.relate_table_column_name as images_relate_table_column_name FROM product_info pi left join (select resource_id, resource_name, resource_path, related_table_name, related_table_key, relate_table_column_name from static_resources where related_table_name='product_info' and relate_table_column_name='images' ) as images on images.related_table_key=pi.product_info_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}

select pi.product_info_id , pi.product_name , pi.barcode , pi.category , pi.brand , pi.specification , pi.unit , pi.images_resource_key , pi.serial_number , pi.shelf_life , pi.min_stock , pi.product_status_enum_product_status_enum_id_1 ,images.resource_id as images_resource_id ,images.resource_name as images_resource_name ,images.resource_path as images_resource_path ,images.related_table_name as images_related_table_name ,images.related_table_key as images_related_table_key ,images.relate_table_column_name as images_relate_table_column_name FROM product_info pi left join (select resource_id, resource_name, resource_path, related_table_name, related_table_key, relate_table_column_name from static_resources where related_table_name='product_info' and relate_table_column_name='images' ) as images on images.related_table_key=pi.product_info_id
where pi.product_info_id = #{id}
